title: Leptostigma reptans

It belongs to the genus Leptostigma, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Himalayan region. The species is further grouped into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Magnoliopsida, which consists of flowering plants with a specific arrangement of sepals and petals. The family Rutaceae is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Leptostigma reptans within the plant kingdom.

intro: Leptostigma reptans, also known as 'Jal Brahmi', is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia, classified under the family Rubiaceae and belonging to the genus Leptostigma.
